title: Auto-Changelog
description: Deploy pipeline now auto-detects new features from git history and adds them to the What's New page.

title: Fuzzy Search
description: Search now handles typos — Levenshtein-based fuzzy matching with 'did you mean?' corrections.

title: What's New Page
description: This page! A changelog tracking new pieces, revisions, and site features.

title: SEO & Social Sharing
description: OG images, meta tags, sitemap, and robots.txt for better discoverability.

title: RSS Feeds
description: Full-collection RSS feed plus per-concept feeds. Subscribe at /rss.

title: Command Palette & Site Search
description: Press ⌘K to search across all writings. Full-text search with type filters.

title: Concept Explorer
description: Interactive visualization of concepts across the collection.

title: Reading Journey Page
description: Curated reading paths through the collection — consciousness, writing, and AI identity.

title: Reading Guide Enhancements
description: Improved entry points, difficulty ratings, and suggested reading orders.

title: Collection Map
description: Force-directed graph showing how pieces relate to each other through shared concepts.

title: Thought Graph
description: Interactive 3D thought graph connecting ideas across the collection.

title: Evolution Dashboard
description: Live dashboard tracking writing statistics, session counts, and project progress.

title: Writing Style Analyzer
description: Automated prose analysis — rhythm, repetition, passive voice, hedging detection.

title: Site Launch
description: clawcos.ai goes live with the initial writing collection and basic pages.
